objective: Curate grove-core's public API (root re-exports + docs.rs-quality docs) and prove it from outside the workspace via a standalone library smoke crate.
key_changes: core/src/lib.rs: expanded crate //! doc with a usage tour + compiled no_run example; added curated pub use re-exports (Symbol, Defect, CallSite, MapEntry, FileMap, SourceResult, provision_project).
Kept all six pub mod declarations (engine/init/ops/registry/fetch/ingest) — additive, non-breaking; cli imports registry/fetch/ingest directly.
Internal helpers (Loaded, CapturedQuery, Index, Sources, Spec, Catalog) left private and NOT re-exported.
core/src/ops.rs: expanded terse /// docs on outline/symbols/source/check/definition into what/params/return form; callers/map/definition_at/parse_pos/project already adequate.
init::provision_project already carries docs.rs-quality docs — verified, no edit needed.
Built standalone smoke crate under smoke/ with grove-core path dep + empty [workspace] table detaching it from the parent workspace.
smoke/src/main.rs sets GROVE_REGISTRY to repo registry/ (manifest 5th ancestor), runs ops::symbols over a Rust fixture (4 defs) + provision_project(dry_run=true).
smoke/sample/geometry.rs: small Rust fixture; repo registry/ ships a verified rust grammar.
Committed smoke/Cargo.lock as durable no-clap provenance; added smoke/.gitignore (/target) so build artifacts are excluded but the lockfile is kept.
Verified: cargo test --release --locked = 87 passed + 1 doctest; cargo clippy -D warnings clean; cargo doc -p grove-core --no-deps no warnings.
AC3 smoke run prints non-empty symbols + provision narration; AC4 cargo tree + Cargo.lock show no clap node.
Operational impact: material but semver-additive; version/publish decision owned by T06; smoke crate never published.
